name: desc_first_ik_branch

symptoms: the wrist/forearm link lands ON TOP of the object during descent, blocking it
descent stalls high; fingers close beside/above the object
trace_evidence: contact pair wrist_link (e.g. link5) <-> object with impulse ~1-2 during descent
the grasp-config IK was SEEDED from the pre-grasp solution (same-branch continuation into a wrist-low posture)

when_to_apply: Redundant or branch-rich arms where seeding the grasp IK from the pre-grasp solution continues into a bad branch (wrist below the tool line).
repair_strategy: Invert the seeding order: solve the GRASP config first with a seed sweep (pick the lowest-error, wrist-high branch), then solve the PRE-GRASP seeded FROM the grasp solution. The approach then hovers directly above in the same good branch and the descent is a short straight drop.
code_sketch: desc = best_full_pose(env, grasp_pt, d, jaw, seed_sweep=True)   # own sweep, NOT seeded
appr = best_full_pose(env, pre_pt,  d, jaw, seed=desc.arm_qpos) # seeded FROM desc
validated_on: AlohaMini Pro rubiks-cube grasp (wrist-on-cube contact eliminated)
